trigger.description: One or more curation candidates could not be evaluated against TTL policy.
setup_commands: ee remember --workspace . --level semantic --kind fact 'J6 curation missing_policy target memory.' --json

ee diag curation-candidate --workspace . --candidate-id curate_j6000000000000000000000002 --candidate-type deprecate --status pending --target-memory-id <memory-id> --source-type feedback_event --source-id j6-ttl_blocked --reason 'J6 missing TTL policy fixture' --confidence 0.8 --created-at 2026-05-01T00:00:00Z --review-state new --state-entered-at 2026-05-01T00:00:00Z --ttl-policy-id curation.j6.missing --json

expected_emission.repair_string: Run `ee curate disposition --json` for candidate-level errors.
